rationale: Educ. Code §45.0541 governs charter district bond eligibility criteria and is unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amount.
quote:
To be eligible for approval by the commissioner, charter district bonds must:
(1) without the guarantee, be rated as investment grade by a nationally recognized investment rating firm; and
(2) be issued under Chapter 53.
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and charter district bond eligibility requirements.
